X = Denotes the end of the POA indicators in special data processing situations that may be identified by 
CMS in the future (terminated 1/2011). 
Null/missing = Identifies diagnosis codes that are exempt from the POA reporting requirements 
(replaces the '1'; same meaning as '0'). 
COMMENT: 
The E codes are used to identify external causes of injury, poisoning, or other adverse events.
